name: to show Fee Structure components and documents
script: // ── Child Table: Applicant Fee ──────────────────────────────── frappe.ui.form.on("Applicant Fee", { fee\_structure(frm, cdt, cdn) { let row = locals[cdt][cdn]; if (!row.fee\_structure) { if (frm.fields\_dict["fees"]) { frm.fields\_dict["fees"].grid.wrapper .find(".fee-components-preview").remove(); } return; } fetch\_and\_render\_components(frm, row, cdt, cdn); } }); // ── Fetch and Render Fee Components ────────────────────────── function fetch\_and\_render\_components(frm, row, cdt, cdn) { frappe.call({ method: "frappe.client.get", args: { doctype: "Fee Structure", name: row.fee\_structure }, callback(r) { if (!r.message) return; let fs = r.message; let total = 0; let rows\_html = ""; (fs.components || []).forEach(c => { total += flt(c.amount); rows\_html += `| ${c.fees\_category || ""} | ${format\_currency(c.amount, fs.currency)} | `; }); let html = `  Fee Components — ${row.fee\_structure}  | Fee Category | Amount | | --- | --- | ${rows\_html}| Total | ${format\_currency(total, fs.currency)} | | --- | --- |  `; if (frm.fields\_dict["fees"]) { frm.fields\_dict["fees"].grid.wrapper .find(".fee-components-preview").remove(); frm.fields\_dict["fees"].grid.wrapper.append(html); } frappe.model.set\_value(cdt, cdn, "total\_amount", total); } }); } // ── Re-render Fee Components on Saved Form Load ─────────────── frappe.ui.form.on("Create Admission", { refresh(frm) { (frm.doc.fees || []).forEach(row => { if (row.fee\_structure) { fetch\_and\_render\_components(frm, row, "Applicant Fee", row.name); } }); } });
